info.title: Convirza API
info.description: Convirza helps you unlock more value from what happens before, during, and after your calls. The API provides access to call management, campaign management, call flow management, scorecard, blacklist, phone number search, SMS, webhooks, and more.

get.summary: Get archived call data (2.5+ years old)
Get calls with detailed transcription data

post.summary: Upload audio file with call details

get.summary: Get DNI snippet for a group
Get available reports for logged-in user

call_date.description: Date and time of the call
